description_long: This object consists of a row of six small, vintage-style oil lamps, each with a rounded metallic base and a short, curved spout. The lamps feature glass chimneys in alternating colors: clear and blue, with the clear ones having a frosted appearance. Each lamp has a small, upright handle attached to the side of the base, likely for carrying or adjusting. The metallic bases display a slightly tarnished, antique brass or bronze finish, adding to their old-fashioned charm. The glass chimneys are bulbous and taper towards the top, with the blue glass providing a striking contrast to the otherwise muted tones. The overall design is compact and decorative, suitable for tabletop or shelf display in an urban or historical setting.
description: A set of six vintage oil lamps with metallic bases and alternating clear and blue glass chimneys, featuring ornate handles and a classic, antique look.
description_view_0: Front view showing all six lamps in a row, highlighting the alternating blue and clear glass chimneys and the ornate metallic bases.
description_view_1: Side view showing the lamps aligned closely, with the glass chimneys forming a vertical stack and the metallic bases mostly obscured.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying the backs of the lamps and the consistent arrangement of glass chimneys and metallic bases.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with the glass chimneys stacked and the bases mostly hidden from sight.
